latest_evidence_summary: OpenNori status/resume/report now return routeable no-current-goal or health recovery state instead of unexpected_error when a project has no current Nori Contract. In agent-workbench, status now returns ok true with status needs-action, reason no_current_goal, agent_next health_needs_recovery, failed checks for missing .opennori/current and .opennori/drafts, and a short TTY summary pointing to recovery.
